details.redacted_summary: - If the user already explicitly says both script repair and AI repair were tried and still failed, directly mention 高明达（ou_d8d4047e9083cc44527a2429b4f757a4） and 管志成（ou_17a0ae2d4c87a64e75294ea441084740） for follow-up instead of repeating the auto-repair guidance. 注意：不要误 @ 张瑞奇（ou_4514aa6582f32fd92d9c001fa3349f27）。 - Bot 经常“不响应”补充排查口径（管志成 2026-06-09）：openclaw-tui 不是 openclaw gateway；没响应时先看 WebUI 是否有工具调用，也可以换模型试试，很多时候是后台在干活或模型响应慢。 - Bot 不响应排查新增案例（管志成 2026-06-09）：Feishu 插件被禁用（`plugins.entries.feishu.enabled=false`）会导致 Feishu WebSocket 连接未建立、飞书消息无法收到；处理是 `openclaw plugins enable feishu` 并重启 Gateway，确认 bot open_id 解析成功、ws client ready、Gateway health OK 且 Feishu configured。 - Exception: for Feishu-specific read/write/document/tool permission issues after script + AI repair fail, mention/route to

triage.rationale: The summary contains team-channel operational guidance with identifiable employee names and routing instructions, even though Feishu IDs are redacted. This is not high-confidence safe personal experience for auto-release without further anonymization.
suggested_redactions: Replace named individuals with role-based labels such as primary maintainer, backup maintainer, or do-not-mention contact.
Keep all Feishu IDs and open_id values redacted.
Remove or generalize team-channel routing instructions that identify specific people.
Consider generalizing internal source references and hashes if released outside the review context.
triage.release_summary: When a user reports that both scripted repair and AI repair have already failed, avoid repeating the same automated guidance and escalate to the appropriate role-based maintainer. For bot non-response issues, distinguish UI inactivity from backend work by checking whether tool calls are occurring and consider model latency or switching models. For messaging-platform integrations, a disabled plugin can prevent websocket connection and message receipt; remediation is to enable the integration, restart the service, and verify identity resolution, websocket readiness, service health, and integration configuration.
triage.reusable_lesson: Escalate after confirmed repair exhaustion, and verify integration enablement plus connection health before diagnosing a bot as non-responsive.
triage.residual_risk: Role ownership and escalation routing should be maintained in a private team registry rather than embedded in reusable guidance.
